pages.text: A guidebook recording wild hunting and companion coordination.$(br2)As long as it is carried in the inventory, main hand, or off hand, it changes how nearby pets receive damage.
pages.title: Guide to Feral Hunt

pages.text: When nearby pets take damage, the Guide to Feral Hunt attempts to transfer part of that danger to their owner.$(br2)This can protect pets, but it also means the owner must accept greater risk.
pages.title: Damage Transfer

pages.text: When used together with the Guide to Animal Companionship, the transferred damage receives additional reduction.$(br2)It is useful for players who often fight or explore with pets.
pages.title: Synergy
